summary: Tested Bundles Admin System with full CRUD API and Admin UI. Backend API passes all 10 tests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, filter by pillar, seed-defaults). Admin UI loads correctly with Create Bundle modal working. Bundles grid shows loading spinner due to intermittent 502 errors from preview environment.

integration_issues.issue: Bundles grid stays in loading spinner state - API calls made but intermittent 502 errors from preview environment prevent data loading
integration_issues.note: Backend API works correctly when tested locally (http://localhost:8001). Issue is with preview environment networking - intermittent 502 errors.

action_items: NOTE: Backend Bundles API is fully functional - all CRUD operations working
NOTE: Admin UI Create Bundle modal is working correctly
Preview environment has intermittent 502 errors - may need to retry or check K8s networking
critical_code_review_comments: bundle_routes.py correctly excludes MongoDB _id from responses (line 73, 94, 172)
Discount calculation in PUT endpoint correctly recalculates when prices change (lines 155-161)
BundlesManager.jsx has proper data-testid attribute for testing (line 349)
API properly handles soft delete by setting active=false (lines 183-196)

success_rate.frontend: 70% - UI components load, Create modal works, but bundles grid stuck in loading due to 502 errors

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bundles CRUD API is fully functional. Backend tests in test_bundles_crud.py cover all endpoints. Admin UI components (BundlesManager) load correctly - Create Bundle modal with all fields (name, description, pillar, icon, items, prices, popular, active) works. The bundles grid loading issue appears to be intermittent 502 errors from preview environment networking rather than a code issue.

tests_passed: test_01_get_all_bundles - GET /api/bundles returns bundles with image_url field
test_05_create_new_bundle - POST /api/bundles creates bundle with discount calculation
test_07_update_bundle - PUT /api/bundles/{id} updates and recalculates discount

frontend_ui_verification.action_buttons: PASS - Seed Defaults, Generate All Images, Sync → Prod, Create Bundle visible
frontend_ui_verification.pillar_filters: PASS - All Pillars, Celebrate, Dine, Travel, etc. visible
frontend_ui_verification.create_bundle_modal: PASS - Opens with all form fields
frontend_ui_verification.bundles_grid: ISSUE - Stuck in loading spinner (502 errors from preview environment)
